Backend • Platform • Leadership

I build backend and platform systems that scale, and the execution systems that help teams scale with them.

Distributed systems, platform architecture, engineering leadership, and AI-enabled tooling across scheduling, routing, data, and retrieval-heavy products.

See projects About the work

Current focus

Operating at the intersection of staff-level technical ownership and engineering-manager-level execution: backend modernization, architecture standards, team operating systems, and practical AI retrieval work.

7+ years 8-engineer team scope $3M → $15M MRR

On the radar

Forward-looking work that still stays grounded.

AI-enablement systems, retrieval-backed workflows, and internal platform work where cleaner architecture and faster decision-making can compound together.

Backend/platform engineering leader with 7+ years of experience building distributed systems, improving performance at scale, and leading teams across roadmap, architecture, and delivery.

Featured work

Selected case studies with measurable outcomes.

Project cards mirror the reference structure while staying grounded in your actual backend, platform, and AI retrieval work.

Featured

Dynamic scheduling engine

Designed and optimized a slot-based scheduling engine for high-volume booking, rescheduling, and cancellation workflows.

PythonScheduling servicesDatabase optimizationCaching
Featured

AndGo platform scaling and modernization

Led backend and platform evolution across fleet, scheduling, pricing, and engineering systems while pairing architecture direction with roadmap ownership and team operating cadence.

PythonFlaskFastAPIGraphQL
Featured

Routing optimization engine

Designed routing optimization for mobile technicians across multi-location field operations, using travel time, service duration, and time windows instead of simplistic distance logic.

Backend servicesOptimization logicTravel-time modelingOperational workflows
